##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Gunnar Farber
##DESCRIPTION=Euhedral vitreous green crystals, associated with R150038 black octahedral trevorite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R150037
